pages.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
pages.privacy.content_html:
The use of our website or applications involves the collection, processing and storage of personal data.

In accordance with the French Data Protection Act (Loi Informatique et Libertés) and the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), the files containing these data have been declared to the CNIL where applicable.

Our privacy policy has been in effect since May 25, 2018, in compliance with the GDPR.

Data Controller

The data controller details are provided in our legal notices page, under the "CNIL declaration" section.

Hosting

Data are hosted by our hosting provider; details are listed on the "Hosting" section of the legal notices page.

Transfer of personal data

Personal data collected are used exclusively by Offitrade for the purposes described in this policy.

Persons concerned

Any person browsing our website or using our applications may be subject to collection and processing of their personal data.

Type of data collected and processed

Website

When browsing, the IP address may be collected in secure log files. These data help identify technical anomalies or potential attacks.

Contact form

When you fill in a contact form we receive the following information: first name, last name, email, phone, subject and message. Emails are deleted once processed.

Partner pharmacy websites

When accessing partner pharmacy websites our policy no longer applies; data are then governed by each partner's privacy policy.

Offitrade Applications

The applications collect only the information necessary for registration and reminders. E-prescriptions are handled directly by the user and the pharmacy.

Data processing

Data are inserted, modified or deleted via our software on the hosting servers. Each action is logged with date and author.

Security and retention

Personal and health data are kept on secure servers by a hosting provider compliant with legal obligations. They are encrypted and isolated to ensure confidentiality.

User rights

Under GDPR you have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict or object to processing, and the right to data portability.

To exercise your rights please contact us via our contact form or by postal mail with a copy of an identity document.

In case of unresolved disputes you may contact the CNIL: https://www.cnil.fr
pages.legal.title: Legal Notice
pages.legal.content_html:
This site is published by Offitrade, the company responsible for publication and content.

Site publisher

  • Name: Offitrade
  • Address: 14 rue Beffory, 92200 Neuilly-sur-Seine, France
  • Email: contact@offitrade.fr

    • Intellectual property

    All content on this site, including texts, images, logos, videos and icons, is the exclusive property of Offitrade or its partners. Reproduction, modification or redistribution without written permission is prohibited.

    Collection of personal data

    Information collected via contact or registration forms is used only to process requests. Under GDPR you can exercise your rights by contacting contact@offitrade.fr.

    Liability

    Offitrade strives to provide reliable and up-to-date information. However, we cannot guarantee complete accuracy and disclaim liability for any errors or omissions.

    Contact

    For questions regarding the legal notice you can contact us at: contact@offitrade.fr
